hero.mainTitle: Tumhari AI-powered personal diary jo sach mein tumhe samajhti hai
hero.mainSubtitle: Freely likho, gehraai se reflect karo, aur apne thoughts se meaningful insights paao.
hero.subtitle: WinDear tumhari private AI diary hai. Reflect karo, grow karo, aur chill karo.
hero.note: No pressure. No judgment. Just you.
why.title: WinDear kyun?
why.subtitle: Kyunki tumhare thoughts deserve karte hain ek better jagah. 🏠
how.title: Kaise kaam karta hai
how.subtitle: Clear mind ke liye 3 simple steps.
features.title: Clarity ke liye sab kuch
privacy.title: Tumhare thoughts private hain 🔒
privacy.subtitle: WinDear trust pe built hai. Tumhare reflections sacred hain, aur hum unhe full security ke saath treat karte hain.
cta.title: Aaj hi khud ko samajhna shuru karo. ✨
auth.subtitle: Reflection aur growth ke liye tumhari private space.
dash.howAreYou: Aaj kaisa feel kar rahe ho?
dash.placeholder: Kya chal raha hai dimaag mein?
dash.writingMood: Tumhara mood reflect kar rahe hain...
dash.empty.title: Pehli entry likho
dash.empty.subtitle: Jo dimaag mein hai likho. Tumhare thoughts yahan safe hain.
dash.empty.demoText: Maine saare tasks time se pehle khatam kar liye, jo kaafi rewarding tha...
feedback.title: Help us improve
dash.consistencyText: Tumne {{count}} baar likha hai. Keep going, khud ko aur deeply samjho.
dash.tipText: Bas 5 minute ke liye bina ruke likho. Grammar ya sense ki tension mat lo—bas flow hone do.
dash.prompt.gratitude.text:
Aaj main in cheezon ke liye grateful hoon...
1.
2.
3.
dash.prompt.reflection.text:
Aaj main kaisa feel kar raha hoon?
Kya accha hua?
Kya aur behtar ho sakta tha?
landing.struggle.title: Thoughts ka raita faila hai? 🤯
landing.struggle.item1.title: Thoughts messy hain
landing.struggle.item1.desc: Uljhe hue ideas jinhe bahar aane ka raasta nahi milta.
landing.struggle.item2.title: Overthinking ho rahi hai
landing.struggle.item2.desc: Wahi loops baar-baar chal rahe hain.
landing.struggle.item3.title: Koi sunne wala nahi
landing.struggle.item3.desc: Sab kuch andar rakhna heavy lagta hai.
landing.relief.title: Tumhare mind ka saathi. 🤝
landing.relief.item1.title: Thoughts ko clarity do
landing.relief.item1.desc: AI insights jo tumhe patterns dikhate hain.
landing.relief.item2.title: AI jo tumhari vibe samajhta hai
landing.relief.item3.title: Private, judgment-free space
landing.relief.item3.desc: Tumhara data tumhara hai. Safe, secure, aur silent.
landing.how.step1.title: 1. Freely likho
landing.how.step1.desc: Jo dimaag mein hai express karo. No filters, no formatting, bas raw thoughts.
landing.how.step2.title: 2. AI insight paao
landing.how.step2.desc: Apne emotions aur patterns samjho. Hum woh reflect karte hain jo shayad tumne miss kar diya ho.
landing.how.step3.title: 3. Time ke saath grow karo
landing.how.step3.desc: Apne thoughts ko evolve hote dekho. Apni journey track karo aur self-awareness badhao.
landing.features.item1.title: AI emotional insights
landing.features.item1.desc: Gentle AI reflections se apni feelings ko deeply samjho.
landing.features.item2.title: Mood tracking
landing.features.item2.desc: Dekho tumhara mood kaise change hota hai aur kya influence karta hai.
landing.features.item3.title: Weekly reflections
landing.features.item3.desc: Tumhare thoughts, patterns, aur progress ka weekly recap.
landing.features.item4.title: Private & secure
landing.features.item4.desc: Ek safe space jahan tumhari privacy hi priority hai.
landing.privacy.note: No judgment. No leaks. Bas tumhare liye ek safe space. ✨
landing.cta.note1: Start karne mein 10 seconds se kam lagte hain
